title: BEM-921 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM921_SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL_WITH_PROMPTS.md with content # BEM-921 SYSTEM EVOLUTION PROTOCOL WITH PROMPT TEXTS
Status: READY_FOR_OPERATOR_REVIEW
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: correct BEM-920 by providing not only a list of prompts but also working draft texts for object and element prompts, so the operator can review and approve them.
Reason:
- Operator pointed out that BEM-920 listed prompts but did not provide their contents.
- Without prompt contents and elements_registry, the system remains non-operational because executors do not know who they are, what they can do, what is prohibited, and whom they report to.
Correction included:
- The protocol explains that it is a map from raw repository state to a working managing contour, not a Telegram protocol.
- The document includes canonical draft prompts for OBJ-GD-001, EL-CUR-GD-001, OBJ-DIR-001, EL-CUR-DIR-001, OBJ-WRK-001, EL-CUR-WRK-001, WRK-C1, WRK-C2, WRK-C3, CNT-DIR-RULE-001, CNT-DIR-PLAN-001 and GD internal strategic contour.
- It keeps Claude's 13 requirements as acceptance criteria.
- It defines BEM-920..BEM-928 roadmap with Done conditions.
- It states that after operator approval, implementation starts with elements_registry.json, prompt files, object-to-element references and component inventory.
Local operator artifacts:
- BEM921_system_evolution_protocol_with_prompt_texts_ru.docx
- BEM921_system_evolution_protocol_with_prompt_texts_ru.zip
QA: DOCX rendered to 7 pages; no edge clipping detected.
No issue comments.
